reviews.comment:
Todo ok, gasoil acceso y muy variado. Los baños impecables y también venden regionales aunque el precio de los mismos es bastante elevado

(Translated by Google)
Everything was fine, diesel was accessible and very varied. The restrooms were spotless, and they also sold regional drinks, although the prices were quite high.
